title: Onakkaga Poranthene Lyrics Pannaiyarum Padminiyum Song Lyrics
singerName: Anu Anand, Balram, Sandhya, SPB Charan
stanzas:
Song: Onakkaga Poranthene
Singer(s): Balram, Sandhya, S.P.B.Charan, Anu Anand
Movie: Pannaiyarum Padminiyum
Music: Justin Prabhakaran

[Balram, Sandhya]
Onakkaga Poranthene enathazhagaa
piriyaama irupene pagal iravaa (2)

unakku vaakkapattu varusanga pona enna
pogaadhu unndoa paasam
en uchi mudhal paadham varai
en purusan aatchi.
oor thekkaalathaan nikku
andha muthaalamman saatchi.

Enakkaga Poranthaye enathazhagi
irupene manasellaam unnai ezhudhi

Oruvaati enna, urasaati unna
uruthum panjana methayum
raathiri poothiri yethura velayila.

Karuvaatu paana, kedachaaka poona
vidumaa solladi sundhari
nethili vathalu veesura vaadayila

Poovaatam otkaandhu maavaatum neramthaan
munkaiyyan neetaadha mundhaanai oramdhaan.

Nee muthipona kathiriya
puthampudhu pinji.
naan mundhaanaalu aalaanadhaa
ennudhu un nenju.

Onakkaga Poranthene enathazhagaa
piriyaama irupene pagal iravaa.

[s.p charan, Anu Anand]
Odhungaadey thottu
usupethi vittu
unakaa oovoru madhiri
naakkula nenjula pachaya kuthi vachen.

Idhudhaandhi radham
idhuvethaan nelam
unnathaan otkaaravchi naan
rasaadhi raasaa naan oorgolam vandhidiven.

Aathoram kaathaadum
kaathodu naathaadum.
naan paathaatamaa, naathaatamaa ..
un nizhalum naalum
nee maalaydum velai idhu
ketkudhu yen thozhu ...

Unakkaaga porandheney enathazhagaa
piriyama irupene pagal iravaa
Unakku maalayittu varusanga pona enna
pogadhu unnoda paasam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Onakkaga Poranthene'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and devotion, highlighting the bond between partners.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Pannaiyarum Padminiyum'?

This song plays during a romantic moment, showcasing the relationship dynamics between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of 'Onakkaga Poranthene'?

The song features talented singers including Anu Anand, Balram, Sandhya, and SPB Charan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Onakkaga Poranthene' was composed by Justin Prabhakaran.

When was 'Onakkaga Poranthene' released?

The song was released on November 23, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Pannaiyarum Padminiyum, Onakkaga Poranthene serves as a heartfelt expression of love between the lead characters. The song beautifully conveys emotions of affection and commitment, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. With its soothing melody and engaging lyrics, it evokes a sense of warmth and happiness. This duet captures the essence of companionship, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Onakkaga Poranthene from the Pannaiyarum Padminiyum soundtrack is a delightful romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and companionship. Featuring a unique collaboration of talented singers like Anu Anand, Balram, Sandhya, and SPB Charan, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the joys of love. With Justin Prabhakaran's enchanting music, this track is a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: I was born for you, and I will remain beautiful without separation, day and night.
Your love is so strong that it cannot be lost, and my heart is devoted to you until the end of my life. Your presence is like a blessing from the village.
I exist for you, and my beauty is for you, my heart is always writing about you.
What is a person to me, and what is a relationship to you? In the night, I bloom like a flower in the work of the night.
Like a flower in the garden, if it blooms, it will be beautiful. Tell me, lovely fish, will you swim in the waves?
The flower blooms, and the time is right for the harvest, but the one who is not ready will miss the chance.
The flower does not fall, and the fragrance does not fade.
You are the one who has captured my heart. I am the one who will always be yours, my heart is yours.
I was born for you, and I will remain beautiful without separation, day and night.
Don't run away, I have kept you in my heart like a treasure, just like everyone else.
This is the rhythm of life, and this is the land where you will find happiness. I will come to the village.
I will be with you, I have given my heart to you, and I will not let go.
I will protect you and keep you safe. I will always be there for you, and your shadow will always be with me.
I was born for you, and I will remain beautiful without separation, day and night. Your love is so strong that it cannot be lost.
